description: Create a daily Notion note from a template, prefill carry-over tasks, and append a structured agenda block.
author: codex
mermaid_fsm:
stateDiagram-v2
  [*] --> OpenTemplate
  OpenTemplate --> ExtractCarryOver: template_loaded
  ExtractCarryOver --> CreateDailyPage: carry_over_ready
  CreateDailyPage --> UpdateAgenda: page_created
  UpdateAgenda --> SaveDailyNote: agenda_ready
  SaveDailyNote --> CaptureEvidence: saved
  CaptureEvidence --> [*]

steps.description: Open the daily note template page and wait for the content blocks to render.
Read carry-over tasks, yesterday summary, and pinned agenda blocks from the template source page.
Create a fresh daily page from the target parent location using the configured date title.
Append the agenda, carry-over tasks, and meeting checklist to the new daily page.
Persist a local markdown export of the generated daily note for audit and replay.
Capture a final full-page screenshot of the generated daily note.
